scope: Step 1-7 (Phase 1 implementation only). Step 8-9 (manual ablation/noise floor) and Step 10-11 (docs/PR) are deferred.
merge_dependency: Issue #156 must be merged before Step 5-6. We will check #156 status before Step 5; if still open, stop after Step 4 and report.
approach: TDD red->green->refactor per Step. Run pytest after each Step. Stop on first hard failure and report.
